variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.service
| fields entity.name
| dedup entity.name
| limit 1000

fetch dt.entity.service
| filter in (entity.name, array($Service))
| fields id

0.title: Top N+1 Spans
0.description: Top N+1 Spans. In any table row, click on a Service to drill down on Service details (Services App) and click on an Endpoint to drill down to the Span details (Distributed Traces App).
0.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>toDouble($TopN)
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fieldsAdd trace_id = toString(trace.id), span_id = toString(span.id)
| fields   `N+1 Count` = aggregation.count,
           `Query`=if(isNotNull(db.query.text),db.query.text,else:if(isNotNull(db.operation.name),db.operation.name, else: code.function)),
           trace.id,
           span.id,
           span.name, 
           `Service Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.service),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?perspective=performance&sort=healthIndicators%3Adescending&detailsId=",dt.entity.service,"&sidebarOpen=false#filtering=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,")"),
           Endpoint = concat("[", if(isnull(endpoint.name), span.name, else: endpoint.name), "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse\u0026sidebar=a%2Cfalse\u0026filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+endpoint.name+%3D+",endpoint.name,"+AND+trace.id+%3D+",
                      trace_id,"\u0026traceId=",trace_id,"\u0026spanId=",span_id,"\u0026tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,"\u0026pb=true","\u0026tt=",encodeUrl(toString(start_time)),")"),
           `DB` = db.system
| sort `N+1 Count` desc

1.description: Scatter plot of N+1 Spans. Plots that are clustered together indicates heavy database, network and host utilization caused by N+1 queries. Plots at the top of the graph indicates Spans that have a high number of N+1 queries which will also cause heavy database, network and host utilization.
1.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>toDouble($TopN)
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields end_time,aggregation.count,db.query.text,trace.id,span.id,span.name,dt.entity.service, service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service), db.namespace, `Service Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.service),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.services/explorer?perspective=performance&sort=healthIndicators%3Adescending&detailsId=",dt.entity.service,"&sidebarOpen=false#filtering=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,")")
| sort aggregation.count desc

3.query: data record(a="Top N+1 Spans Over Time")

5.title: Number of Database Queries
5.description: Total number of N Database queries. This number excludes the +1 query and indicates the true number of queries that can be reduced.
5.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize c=count(), s= sum(aggregation.count), 
            c1=countif(aggregation.count > 1), s1=sum(if(aggregation.count > 1, aggregation.count))
| fieldsAdd queryReduction = (toDouble(s1)-toDouble(c1))

6.title: N+1 Spans
6.description: The number of Spans that have N+1 Database queries.
6.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize total_spans = count()

9.title: Avg Queries per N+1 Span
9.description: Average number of Database queries from N+1 Spans.
9.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize total_aggregation_count = sum(aggregation.count), total_spans = count()
| fieldsAdd average_count = total_aggregation_count / total_spans

10.title: Max Queries per N+1 Spans
10.description: Number of Database queries from top N+1 Span.
10.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize total_aggregation_count = max(aggregation.count)

11.title: Query Reduction Potential
11.description: Percentage of N queries compared to all Database queries. This number indicates the percentage of queries that can be reduced providing cost savings for both cloud and on-prem Databases.
11.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize c=count(), s= sum(aggregation.count), 
            c1=countif(aggregation.count > 1), s1=sum(if(aggregation.count > 1, aggregation.count))
| fieldsAdd queryReduction = ((toDouble(s1)-toDouble(c1)) / toDouble(s)) * 100

13.title: N+1 Services
13.description: Distribution of Services that have N+1 Database queries.
13.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields aggregation.count, service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| summarize count=sum(aggregation.count),by:{service_name}
| sort count desc
| Limit 20

17.title: N+1 Databases
17.description: Distribution of Databases that have N+1 Database queries.
17.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| fields db.system,aggregation.count, service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| summarize count=sum(aggregation.count),by:{db.system}
| sort count desc
| Limit 20

18.query: data record(a=" N+1 Services, Spans and Databases")

19.title: Number of N Queries
19.description: Percentage of N queries compared to all Database queries. This number indicates the percentage of queries that can be reduced providing cost savings for both cloud and on-prem Databases.
19.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize c=count(), s= sum(aggregation.count), 
            c1=countif(aggregation.count > 1), s1=sum(if(aggregation.count > 1, aggregation.count))
| fieldsAdd queryReduction = (toDouble(s1)-toDouble(c1))

20.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" and aggregation.count>1
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| makeTimeseries `N+1 Query Count` = sum(aggregation.count)

21.content: The N+1 Pattern is one of the top problems in distributed application architectures when accessing data from a database or interacting with downstream services. For databases, we typically see it when using OR-Mappers or when data caches are bypassed. If you want to learn more, read [here](https://www.google.com/search?q=n%2B1+query+problem&sca_esv=aa650d13515d1176&rlz=1C1GCEB_enUS1138US1138&prmd=ivns&sxsrf=AE3TifP0mEDEs4xKPX6y1sYml5TbFB6NdA:1764598751189&source=lnms&fbs=AIIjpHxU7SXXniUZfeShr2fp4giZud1z6kQpMfoEdCJxnpm_3W-pLdZZVzNY_L9_ftx08kxElMEpo90JBBY0TEXYKcN_lPATbVTMCnYfcHh7XdvGae5jHj01p3TAsI279B6pEix-Ebo-Xm7N7egVhh1d5LCuS0xbjxTE2FdxsK-nqyaCmkm3caClecFhWzaA6oYpQRKmio-Eb1uhVGgmeeuowcgedAX7bg&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjHlfHNypyRAxX-E1kFHUALHuEQ0pQJegQIBhAF&biw=3440&bih=1271&dpr=1). This dashboard helps you identify all database queries that show the N+1 Query pattern. The goal is to eliminate unnecessary roundtrips, reduce cloud/infra costs, reduce latency and increase scalability. To learn more, check out this [YouTube video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TJtroXEWf6U) with more patterns we can extract from logs and traces.

22.title: Estimated Number of N Queries per Year
22.description: Estimated number of annual N queries.
22.query:
fetch spans
| filter db.system != "null" 
| filterOut contains(db.query.text, "INSERT")
| filter in (dt.entity.service, array($ServiceID))
| summarize c=count(), s= sum(aggregation.count), 
            c1=countif(aggregation.count > 1), s1=sum(if(aggregation.count > 1, aggregation.count))
| fieldsAdd queryReduction = (toDouble(s1)-toDouble(c1))*52
